boardTitle: Garden Seal App Icon Approval - Round 2

concepts.name: Garden Seal 2.0
concepts.idea: The approved seed is rebuilt as a bold App Store mark: one open seal, two distinct stems, and one shared heart bloom.
concepts.watchout: The stem crossing must remain open in monochrome.
concepts.motionLabel: Seal draws, stems rise, bloom opens
concepts.prompt: Create a true square 1:1 premium mobile app icon for Better Together. This is an original Garden Seal mark, not a scene and not a logo presentation. Solid deep ink-teal #113B36 background fills the full square. Center one thick warm-cream #F5F0E8 open circular seal made from exactly two broad arcs with two small intentional gaps at upper right and lower left. Inside the seal, exactly two separate coral #E5533A stems rise from the lower center, curve gently toward one another without becoming an infinity symbol, and support one compact two-lobed heart bloom. Use no more than four dominant shapes. Flat precise vector geometry with subtly softened organic corners, bold silhouette, 24 percent safe margin, readable at 20 pixels. Design the composition as three separable production layers: background, seal, living center. No text, letters, wordmark, pot, tree scenery, extra leaves, thin lines, shadows, gradient, texture, glow, border, pre-rounded-square mask, people, hands, infinity symbol, or copied brand geometry.

concepts.name: Twin Orbit
concepts.idea: Two equal arcs travel independently and lock around a shared sprout, making partnership visible before growth appears.
concepts.watchout: Arc spacing must avoid reading as a loading spinner.
concepts.motionLabel: Two arcs orbit, align, and lock
concepts.prompt: Create a true square 1:1 premium mobile app icon for Better Together. The solid coral #E5533A background MUST fill the entire square edge to edge with NO white margin or border. Make one centered broken garden ring from EXACTLY TWO disconnected warm-cream #FAF8F5 semicircular arc segments, one left and one right, equal thickness, with one gap at the top and one at the bottom. There must be no inner ring and no extra arc. Center EXACTLY TWO compact deep ink-teal #113B36 seed leaves, one left and one right, contained fully inside the ring. The two leaves lean toward each other and their inner edges create a tiny vertical heart-like negative-space notch; do not draw a heart. Three visual groups only: coral field, two-part cream ring, paired teal leaves. Flat original vector symbol, bold silhouette, 24 percent safe margin, clear at 20 pixels. NO frame, white outside area, spinner, concentric circles, text, letters, stems, extra leaves, butterfly, hands, people, pot, scenery, gradient, shadow, texture, or pre-rounded icon mask.

concepts.name: Seed & Halo
concepts.idea: A single coral seed lands inside the relationship circle and becomes a living shared center.
concepts.watchout: The seed must stay distinctive from a map pin or flame.
concepts.motionLabel: Seed lands, halo ripples, leaves appear
concepts.prompt: Create a true square 1:1 premium mobile app icon for Better Together. Solid warm white #FAF8F5 background fills the square. Center one bold deep ink-teal #113B36 open circular halo made from a single thick stroke with one gap at the bottom. Inside place an original paired seed symbol made from EXACTLY TWO coral #E5533A vertical almond halves, left and right, separated by a narrow warm-white line. The paired seed is upright, geometric, and pointed slightly at top and bottom. Add one very small deep ink-teal sprout tip above the seed, centered. The seed MUST NOT be heart-shaped, round, or fruit-like. Three visual groups only, flat precise vector geometry, 25 percent safe margin, readable at 20 pixels. NO apple, fruit, heart, radish, map pin, flame, face, text, letters, pot, landscape, extra leaves, gradient, shadow, texture, thin detail, border, or pre-rounded icon mask.

concepts.name: Paired Leaf Seal
concepts.idea: Two leaves become the relationship: separate forms with a small heart-shaped space held between them.
concepts.watchout: The leaf asymmetry needs to feel intentional at small size.
concepts.prompt: Create a true square 1:1 premium mobile app icon for Better Together. Solid coral #E5533A background fills the square. Center one thick warm-cream #FAF8F5 circular seal with a single narrow opening at bottom center. Inside the seal place EXACTLY TWO small deep ink-teal #113B36 leaves, one left and one right, each occupying less than one quarter of the ring interior. They tilt inward but remain visibly separate. Their inner edges form a tiny narrow heart-like negative-space notch only; do not draw a heart shape. Add two short separate teal stems pointing down toward the seal opening. Keep every leaf fully inside the ring with generous coral space around it. Flat refined vector symbol, bold simple silhouette, 24 percent safe margin, readable at 20 pixels. NO literal heart, butterfly, wings, hands, giant leaves, overlap with the ring, eco badge, lotus, flower, tree, extra leaves, text, letters, gradient, shadow, texture, border, or pre-rounded icon mask.

concepts.name: Rootline Seal
concepts.idea: The seal itself grows from two roots, turning the circle from decoration into the relationship structure.
strengths: Seal and growth are one idea
concepts.watchout: The root split must not resemble horns or a letterform.
concepts.motionLabel: Roots trace outward and complete the seal
concepts.prompt: Create a true square 1:1 premium mobile app icon for Better Together. Solid warm white #FAF8F5 background. Design one original deep ink-teal #113B36 root seal: exactly two thick root strokes begin separately at bottom center, curve outward in opposite directions, and continue upward to form one nearly complete circle. The strokes stop near the top with a small opening. At that opening place one compact coral #E5533A two-petal bloom that visually joins the two ends without hiding their separation. The circle and roots are the same two continuous shapes. Flat premium vector geometry, bold broad strokes, centered, 21 percent safe margin, clear at 20 pixels and suitable for embossing. Motion should trace each root from bottom to top until the bloom appears. No letterforms, horns, antlers, infinity symbol, people, tree branches, pot, scenery, extra leaves, gradient, shadow, texture, border, pre-rounded icon mask, or thin detail.

concepts.name: Quiet Bloom
concepts.idea: The calmest direction uses a single tactile seal and a shared bloom that gently breathes rather than performs.
strengths: Works as launch and widget state
concepts.watchout: The soft material must retain crisp outer geometry.
concepts.motionLabel: Seal breathes and the bloom softly pulses
concepts.prompt: Create a true square 1:1 premium layered mobile app icon for Better Together. Solid warm white #FAF8F5 background. Center one thick matte deep ink-teal #113B36 open garden seal with two small balanced gaps. Inside place exactly one compact soft-clay coral #E5533A bloom made from two rounded petals touching at the base, with two tiny cream stems beneath it. Keep the composition iconic and minimal: one seal, one bloom group, no scene. Very restrained tactile depth, matte material, gentle natural highlight, crisp silhouette, 24 percent safe margin, readable at 20 pixels. Design the seal and bloom as separate Icon Composer layers and support a calm breathing loop. No text, letters, faces, pot, landscape, branches, extra petals, infinity symbol, generic wellness lotus, glossy plastic, dramatic shadows, background gradient, texture, pre-rounded mask, or fine detail.
